message:
bd-3bxhj.4.8: Code emission backend, module partitioner, and project scaffolder

Emit complete FrankenTUI project structure from translated pipeline outputs:
- Model module (struct + Default impl from TranslatedRuntime)
- Message module (enum variants with payloads)
- Update module (match arms with state mutations and Cmd wiring)
- View module (widget tree with conditional rendering)
- Style module (color/typography/border constants, theme structs)
- Effects module (subscription declarations, orchestration plan, init commands)
- Main module (program entry point wiring all modules)
- Cargo.toml with workspace-aware dependencies
- Migration manifest (JSON) linking to strategy decisions and evidence records
- 20 tests covering all emission paths and deterministic output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
